title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions:
Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions!
